text: I find myself wandering through a modern, perhaps futuristic building. The first scene, with its stark lines, subdued colors, and empty corridors, invokes a sense of anticipation, even isolation. I wonder what knowledge awaits around the next corner. Moving to the second scene, I am greeted by an explosion of color and ideas—the wall emblazoned with "R+D" and interactive displays. Here, I feel curiosity and a pull toward discovery, drawn into humanity's ongoing dialogue with technology. The shift from quiet emptiness to vibrant engagement makes me reflect on how environments shape our inner moods and sense of purpose.
